lessons.title: Constructive Trusts Categories and Common Intention
lessons.description: A constructive trust is not created by the express intention of the parties.

lessons.title: Proprietary Estoppel
lessons.description: What is proprietary estoppel? Proprietary estoppel arises where: the owner of land makes a representation or assurance — express or implied — that the claimant has or will have rights over that land; the claimant relies on that re...
